items.title: Review Engramme round structure and term sheet from Gabriel
items.context: Email from gabriel@engramme.com on Jun 2: Subject 'Engramme: round structure and term sheet' — this appears to be the term sheet confirmation Fin was waiting for per deal next_steps.

items.title: Access and review Unstructured Series C VC Tracker spreadsheet
items.context: Email from brian@unstructured.io on Jun 2: Shared 'Series_C_VC_Tracker_May2026' spreadsheet with Derek as editor — indicates Series C fundraise is actively underway and Fin Capital is being tracked.

errors: Full email body retrieval failed for all recent emails due to Microsoft Graph API rate limiting (HTTP 429). To-do extraction was performed using email search snippets/summaries only, which may have missed some action items.
Calendar queries for all deals and non-deal broader scan failed due to rate limiting. No calendar-sourced action items could be extracted this run.
